empleos.descripcion: Estamos buscando un Fullstack Developer altamente capacitado y orientado a resultados para unirse a nuestro equipo. En este puesto, serás responsable de desarrollar, mantener y optimizar aplicaciones web tanto del lado del cliente (frontend) como del servidor (backend), garantizando soluciones escalables, seguras y de alto rendimiento. El candidato ideal siente pasión por el desarrollo de software, disfruta resolver problemas complejos y tiene experiencia trabajando con tecnologías modernas para crear aplicaciones completas. Colaborarás estrechamente con diseñadores, gerentes de producto y otros ingenieros para desarrollar soluciones innovadoras que ofrezcan una excelente experiencia de usuario. Esta posición requiere sólidas habilidades técnicas, pensamiento analítico y la capacidad de desenvolverse eficazmente en un entorno dinámico y colaborativo. Responsabilidades Principales Desarrollar, mantener y optimizar aplicaciones web tanto en frontend como en backend. Diseñar e implementar interfaces de usuario responsivas, intuitivas y de alto rendimiento. Desarrollar y mantener APIs, servicios web y lógica del lado del servidor. Diseñar y administrar bases de datos y garantizar su rendimiento y escalabilidad. Colaborar con equipos de diseño, producto y desarrollo para implementar nuevas funcionalidades. Escribir código limpio, reutilizable y fácil de mantener siguiendo las mejores prácticas. Identificar, solucionar y corregir errores y problemas de rendimiento. Implementar medidas de seguridad y protección de datos en las aplicaciones. Participar en revisiones de código, pruebas, despliegues y procesos de mejora continua. Mantener documentación técnica actualizada. Habilidades y Experiencia Requeridas Experiencia comprobada como Fullstack Developer, Software Engineer o en

motivos: ✓ Tu stack: React, Full Stack, Front End, TypeScript, JavaScript, Back End
empleos.descripcion: We are looking for Frontend-focused Full Stack Engineers with strong expertise in React and solid back-end experience in Java. If you enjoy crafting intuitive user experiences, building modern web applications, and collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver impactful products, we'd love to hear from you!﻿ Key Responsibilities Design and build modern, responsive, and accessible user interfaces using React. Develop and maintain scalable front-end applications with a strong focus on performance and user experience. Collaborate closely with Product, UX/UI Designers, and Back-end Engineers to deliver high-quality features. Contribute to back-end development using Java when needed to support end-to-end feature delivery. Write clean, maintainable, and reusable code following best practices. Ensure application performance, scalability, and security across the stack. Required Qualifications 5+ years of professional experience with React. Solid experience developing back-end services with Java. Strong knowledge of modern JavaScript/TypeScript, React ecosystem, HTML5, and CSS3. Experience integrating with REST APIs. Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, Google Cloud, etc.). Comfortable working with AI-powered tools to enhance productivity, optimize workflows, and support day-to-day development tasks (e.g. code assistance, debugging, documentation, or research). Advanced proficiency in English (both written and spoken). Nice to Have Experience collaborating closely with UX/UI design teams. Familiarity with component libraries and design systems. Experience with unit testing and front-end testing frameworks. Passion for creating exceptional user experiences and continuously improving existing applications. What We Offer Referral bonus Tuition Reimbursement English lessons

empleos.descripcion: As the Full Stack Developer you will design and build software across the backend, frontend, and internal AI tooling for a growing product. You will contribute to technical decisions and collaborate closely with the team to deliver reliable, scalable solutions. This role is well suited for someone who is comfortable working with ambiguity and enjoys ownership over their work. Responsibilities: Design and build AI powered internal tools that improve engineering efficiency Build and maintain REST APIs in Python using Django REST Framework Build and maintain frontend applications using Next.js and TypeScript Write unit, integration, and end to end tests to support software quality Implement secure, scalable, and maintainable solutions Collaborate with Product and Engineering to deliver on shared goals Contribute technical ideas and improvements beyond assigned tasks Requirements C1 English or equivalent 3+ years of experience building production applications with Next.js and TypeScript 3+ years of backend development experience in Python, specifically with Django REST Framework Experience with PostgreSQL in production environments Experience with Docker, Docker Compose, and infrastructure as code such as Terraform Experience with cloud services, ideally AWS Experience setting up and maintaining CI/CD pipelines Experience writing unit, integration, and end to end tests Strong Git and GitHub practices, with an active public profile considered a plus Preferred Qualifications Experience at high growth startups, consultancy or agency backgrounds are also welcome, provided there is demonstrated product ownership rather than delivery only work Experience building with LLMs or AI agents, including LangChain, RAG, or agentic systems Experience training AI models, including dataset

Our partner is looking for a Software Craftsperson (Node.js/React.js/AI) based in Argentina. You will work in an AI-native development environment where modern tools enhance engineering practices without compromising craftsmanship. The role focuses on full-stack ownership, continuous improvement, and delivering meaningful solutions for diverse projects. You will collaborate closely with talented engineers, contribute to technical decisions, and work with a strong product mindset. The environment encourages autonomy, experimentation, and mastery of software development practices. If you enjoy solving complex problems, improving systems, and raising engineering standards, this role offers an opportunity to make a real impact. Accountabilities As a Software Craftsperson, you will take ownership of designing, developing, and improving production systems while following strong engineering principles. You will contribute across the full software development lifecycle, from understanding user needs to delivering reliable solutions. Build and maintain scalable full-stack applications using modern technologies, including Node.js, React.js, and AI-powered development tools. Apply software craftsmanship practices such as test-driven development, clean code principles, refactoring, and continuous delivery. Take end-to-end ownership of features, including front-end development, back-end services, infrastructure, and deployment processes. empleos.descripcion: Mindrift is looking for skilled Full-Stack Web App Developers (JavaScript/TypeScript + Python or Node) to join the Tendem project (https://tendem.ai/) and build interactive browser-based applications within our hybrid AI + human environment. In this role, as an AI Pilot - that's how we refer to this position at Mindrift - you'll collaborate with Tendem Agents that handle repetitive tasks, while you provide full-stack engineering expertise, architectural judgment, and quality control to ensure web apps are functional, robust, and ready for real users. This part-time remote opportunity is ideal for professionals with hands-on experience in modern frontend frameworks, backend APIs, databases, and shipping interactive web products end-to-end. What We Do The Mindrift platform connects specialists with AI projects from major tech innovators. Our mission is to unlock the potential of Generative AI by tapping into real-world expertise from across the globe. About The Role This is a freelance role for a Tendem project. As a Full-Stack Web App Developer, you'll design, build, and refine browser-based applications with real logic, state, persistence, and user input — from habit trackers and budgeting tools to internal dashboards, mini-SaaS tools, and AI-powered apps. You may also work on standalone Python applications and data-processing scripts that sit alongside or behind these products. Key Responsibilities Build interactive web applications with frontend (React, Next.js, Vue, or similar) and a backend API (Python/FastAPI/Flask or Node/Express) Design and implement data models, schemas, and persistence layers using SQL (PostgreSQL, SQLite) or NoSQL stores Implement authentication, sessions, and basic role-based access where needed Integrate third-party APIs and AI/LLM services

motivos: ✓ Tu stack: React, Front End, JavaScript, Git
empleos.descripcion: We are looking for a highly skilled Front-End Engineer with strong expertise in React and Next.js to build and maintain enterprise-grade web applications. The ideal candidate has experience developing scalable, data-intensive platforms, understands how front-end applications interact with APIs and authentication systems, and is comfortable working in a fully remote, English-speaking environment. Requirements 6+ years of professional experience with React (8+ years if no Bachelor's degree). Strong hands-on experience with React Hooks, Functional Components, and modern JavaScript (ES6+). Proven experience with Next.js, including SSR, CSR, routing, and environment-based configurations. Experience consuming secure REST APIs using JWT, OAuth, or similar authentication methods. Strong understanding of RBAC and authorization concepts. Experience optimizing front-end performance and working with large datasets. Proficiency with Git workflows, pull requests, and code reviews. Strong English communication skills (written and verbal). Ability to work independently while maintaining visibility and accountability in a remote environment. Nice to Have Experience with AG Grid Enterprise or similar data-grid solutions. GraphQL experience. Experience with Azure AD / Entra ID. Background in SaaS, multi-tenant applications, financial systems, analytics, or data visualization platforms.

empleos.descripcion: Ubicación AR Descripción Quienes Somos Somos Personal, una empresa que acompaña y potencia la vida de las personas a través de la tecnología. Nuestra propuesta está pensada para que cada persona, comunidad y organización pueda avanzar, conectarse, disfrutar y transformar su realidad. En Personal Pay estamos sumando un/una Developer Frontend Sr para el equipo de Payments con pasión por la innovación, ganas de ser protagonistas y facilidad para el desempeño en un entorno desafiante y dinámico. Buscamos Protagonistas Que Se Animen a ✔️ Trabajar en un equipo autónomo formado por diversos roles con los que interactuar para cumplir los objetivos. ✔️ Desempeñarse en un entorno ágil utilizando las últimas metodologías. ✔️ Construir funcionalidades, trabajando en el diseño de las mismas de manera integral con tu equipo. ✔️ Interactuar directamente con los equipos de diseño de UX para implementar una gran experiencia de usuario. ✔️ Participar del análisis técnico de la solución y en las decisiones técnicas de las mismas junto a los diferentes referentes de cada área implicada. ✔️ Interactuar con diferentes equipos dentro de la organización. Y Cuenten Con Estas Experiencias y Habilidades ✔️ Que sientas curiosidad por el mundo fintech. ✔️ Que te apasione el desafío de crear productos de cero y proponer las mejores soluciones. ✔️ 5+ años de experiencia previa en desarrollo de Software. ✔️ 3+ años de experiencia en el desarrollo de aplicaciones web y/o móviles con React Native (excluyente) ✔️ 2+ años de experiencia trabajando en equipo con arquitecturas distribuidas. ✔️ Es un plus poseer experiencia trabajando con TypeScript, NodeJS y NestJS para la construcción de APIs. ✔️ Que desarrolles usando patrones diseño y sigas buenas prácticas de programación. ✔️ Conocimientos de unit testi

motivos: ✓ Tu stack: Node.js, TypeScript, Full Stack, Front End, Back End
empleos.descripcion: Buscamos un desarrollador Fullstack Senior (Node.js + Angular) para empresa líder en fintech. Importante: Posición remota pero deben residir en Córdoba o Buenos Aires (con facilidad para ir a las oficinas y tener encuentros presenciales por cuatrimestre) Tecnologías clave: Node.js, Angular, AWS (EKS/Lambda) ¿Qué desafío te espera? Buscamos a una persona apasionada por la arquitectura y el desarrollo de software, con un enfoque fullstack senior, para sumarse a un equipo que construye soluciones escalables de alto impacto. Más allá de tirar código, buscamos a un referente técnico hands-on: alguien con la autonomía necesaria para tomar decisiones de arquitectura, proponer mejoras y garantizar la robustez del producto. Vas a trabajar en una infraestructura moderna basada en AWS, colaborando directamente con producto, UX, proveedores y negocio, siendo el dueño técnico de tus desarrollos. Stack tecnológico Backend: Node.js (Fastify), API REST, arquitecturas orientadas a eventos y seguridad avanzada. Frontend: Angular (últimas versiones), TypeScript, RxJS, SCSS. Cloud: AWS (Expertise en EKS, Lambda, ECS, API Gateway, DynamoDB, S3, Cloudfront, CloudWatch). Testing: Foco en calidad con Jest y Cypress. Requisitos +6 años de experiencia real como desarrollador/a fullstack en entornos complejos. Sólidos conocimientos y autonomía en Node.js y Angular de forma principal. Experiencia avanzada diseñando e integrando APIs REST y servicios en la nube (AWS es excluyente para este seniority). Criterio técnico: maestría en buenas prácticas, clean code y patrones de diseño. Capacidad de análisis: entendimiento funcional para traducir necesidades de negocio en soluciones técnicas eficientes. Excelente comunicación y capacidad para canalizar soluciones dentro del equipo.

Full-time | 100% Remote Fast-paced, detail-oriented & execution-focused KNN Digital Media is a global eCommerce company founded by former Google executives. We use performance marketing, media, and machine learning to drive measurable growth across a portfolio of in-house and affiliate brands, including our flagship brand in the health and wellness space, Vital Nutritive. We're looking for a Front End Developer to support the creation, maintenance, and optimization of websites, landing pages, funnels, quizzes, comparison sites, interstitials, and other web assets across our portfolio of brands and projects. This role is primarily focused on website layout, landing page creation and adaptation using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. We are looking for someone who enjoys transforming ideas and business requirements into fast, responsive, and user-friendly web experiences, while maintaining a high standard of quality and attention to detail Why you'll love working with KNN Digital Media Join a high-performing team led by former Google leaders Be part of a fast-scaling global eCommerce company with clear growth opportunities Enjoy a high level of autonomy while collaborating with a smart, international team 100% remote role Work in a results-driven environment where your impact is visible and measurable How You'll Contribute In this role, you will work closely with the Marketing and eCommerce teams, as well as company leadership, to build and maintain a variety of web assets across our portfolio of brands and projects. empleos.descripcion: ¡Sumate a nuestra Krew! Gran oportunidad para sumarte a un empresa en constante crecimiento, con excelente clima laboral y que trabaja para clientes locales e internacionales 🌎 Buscamos un Fullstack Developer (Node/React) con experiencia mínima de 4-5 años para incorporarse a un equipo que trabaja con distintos proyectos. ¿Qué ofrecemos? Uniéndote a Kinamic encontrarás oportunidades, desafíos y desarrollo en tu carrera. ⏰ Horario flexible y trabajo remoto 📊 Variedad de proyectos locales e internacionales 📕 Clases de inglés 🏆 Posibilidad de crecimiento 🎉 Y muchos más beneficios y actividades! Que valoramos de ti? ✔️ Extreme Ownership: Asumís responsabilidad total por los resultados, desde el diseño hasta producción, garantizando sistemas confiables y escalables. ✔️ Espíritu de equipo: Creemos que el trabajo colaborativo es el único camino para alcanzar resultados de alto nivel. 1+1 puede ser mucho más que 2. ✔️ Nos comprometemos a proporcionar un servicio de calidad superior, impulsados por una sólida vocación de servir. Trabajamos para superar constantemente las expectativas de los clientes y mejorar su experiencia a través de un rendimiento excepcional. Nivel de Estudio: ✔️Egresado de las carreras Ingeniería o Licenciatura en Sistemas. Requisitos para la posición: ✔️Excelente nivel de inglés, tanto conversacional como escrito. ✔️+5 años de experiencia desarrollando con React.JS. Experiencia desarrollando interfaces modernas y responsivas utilizando la tecnología. ✔️Experiencia construyendo APIs y servicios backend utilizando Node.js. ✔️Promover buenas prácticas. ✔️Participar en todo el ciclo de vida del desarrollo de software. Valoraremos: ✔️Experiencia con: Kafka RabbitMQ Redis ✔️ Experiencia en fintech. Jornada Laboral: ✔️8hs Modalidad de contratación: ✔️Contractor

empleos.descripcion: Job Description: Omega CRM is a Merkle & Dentsu company, leader in development of Customer Experience services, with +20 years of experience in the use of Technology applied to Marketing and providing a unique Customer Relationship with mainly focus on Innovation is looking for a Backend Developer (Node.js/TypeScript) Main responsabilities: Requirements analysis. Participate in the technical design of projects. Estimate effort for projects. Work collaboratively with the rest of the Omega team and/or the client to help achieve project objectives. Provide support and resolve technical issues to ensure system security and performance. Collaborate with technology providers when required by the project. Document processes and track system performance metrics. Validate and test the technical solution against business requirements. Adhere to the software quality standards agreed upon with Omega's Technical Management. Generate technical documentation for completed projects. Apply best practices and procedures to ensure projects are executed on time and with the highest quality. Requirements & Experience Role Experience: 3-4 years of proven experience in a similar Backend / Software Developer role. Backend Expertise: Strong experience with Node.js and TypeScript, including the development of RESTful APIs and working with Express.js. Communication & Consulting: Proven experience in client-facing roles, acting as a key point of contact to translate business requirements into technical solutions, while effectively collaborating with cross-functional technical teams. Database Management: Solid knowledge of PostgreSQL (specifically in data modeling, database triggers, and functions). Caching & Performance: Hands-on experience using Redis for session management and caching. Best Prac

empleos.descripcion: Mindrift is looking for skilled Frontend Developers (HTML/CSS/JavaScript, React/Next.js) to join the Tendem project (https://tendem.ai/) and build high-quality landing pages and multi-page websites within our hybrid AI + human environment. In this role, as an AI Pilot - that's how we refer to this position at Mindrift - you'll collaborate with Tendem Agents that handle repetitive tasks, while you provide frontend craftsmanship, design sensibility, and quality control to ensure pixel-perfect, conversion-ready websites that match real client briefs. This part-time remote opportunity is ideal for professionals with hands-on experience in landing page production, multi-page website development, and modern frontend frameworks. What We Do The Mindrift platform connects specialists with AI projects from major tech innovators. Our mission is to unlock the potential of Generative AI by tapping into real-world expertise from across the globe. About The Role This is a freelance role for a Tendem project. As a Frontend Developer, you'll design, build, and refine landing pages, waitlist pages, promo pages, and small multi-page sites (portfolios, restaurant sites, small business sites, simple online stores), turning client briefs into responsive, performant, polished web experiences. Key Responsibilities Build landing pages, waitlist pages, and promo pages with clear hero sections, CTAs, and conversion-focused layouts Build small multi-page websites (Home, About, Services, Contact, etc.) that follow client requirements and basic information architecture Implement responsive, mobile-first layouts that work cleanly across devices and browsers Integrate forms, email capture, basic analytics, and simple CMS or headless content sources Apply on-page SEO basics (semantic HTML, meta tags, p

empleos.descripcion: Sobre OnService.AI En OnService AI, diseñamos y desarrollamos soluciones tecnológicas inteligentes que automatizan y optimizan procesos operativos a escala global. A través de nuestro ecosistema AI Concierge, integramos Inteligencia Artificial Generativa (LLMs) y procesamiento de lenguaje natural (NLP) para transformar la experiencia de los usuarios en industrias hiperdinámicas como la aeronáutica. Nos apasiona la ingeniería de software real, las arquitecturas limpias y construir productos robustos de alta disponibilidad. Si te motiva trabajar con tecnología de punta en un ambiente dinámico, flexible y sin burocracias, este es tu lugar. 🚀 La Misión del Rol Como Junior Python Developer, te integrarás a nuestro equipo central de Inteligencia Artificial para apoyar en el desarrollo y la evolución de AI Concierge. Tu objetivo principal será sumarte a los sprints de desarrollo, escribiendo código limpio y participando en la construcción de microservicios y la integración de modelos de IA, contando siempre con el mentoreo y guía de nuestros ingenieros Senior. 🎁 Beneficios y Cultura 🏠 Esquema Híbrido / Remoto ⛱️ 15 días hábiles de PTO 🎉 Día de Cumpleaños libre 📆 Feriados locales de tu país de residencia 🧠 Espacio de Mentoreo: Acompañamiento continuo por parte del equipo Senior para acelerar tu plan de carrera profesional Requisitos mínimos 🎯 El Perfil que buscamos Buscamos a alguien con mentalidad de crecimiento, proactivo y con ganas de aprender. El perfil ideal cuenta con entre 1 y 2 años de experiencia (o proyectos académicos/personales sólidos) y bases en: Fundamentos de Python: Buen manejo del lenguaje, sintaxis y conceptos básicos de programación orientada a objetos. Bases de Datos: Conocimientos básicos en bases de datos relacionales (MySQL, PostgreSQL o SQL Server) y e

Job Title: Frontend Software Engineer Job Type: Contractor Location: Remote Job Summary Frontend Software Engineers to participate in a high-impact customer project, focusing on crafting exceptional user interfaces. In this role, you'll apply your expertise to help train next-generation AI systems. Your work will shape how models learn, reason, and perform through high-quality, real-world input. No prior experience in AI is required — your domain knowledge is what matters. Leverage your ability to interpret detailed component style guides and screenshots, delivering pixel-accurate, responsive web interfaces that set new standards in usability and aesthetics. Strong communication skills are highly valued for effective collaboration and documentation. Scope of Work Interpret and translate component style guides and interface screenshots into precise, visually consistent UI deliverables. Implement pixel-perfect, responsive web components using modern technologies such as Typescript and CSS3. Ensure all UI elements adhere to established design systems and accessibility standards. Collaborate asynchronously through clear documentation and constructive feedback within a remote-first environment. Proactively identify, communicate, and resolve inconsistencies or ambiguities in design specifications. Optimize UI performance across devices, focusing on fast load times and smooth interactions. Contribute domain-specific expertise to guide the training and development of advanced AI models. Preferred Qualifications Minimum of 3 years of professional experience delivering high-quality front-end solutions. Proven proficiency with Typescript, CSS3, and responsive web design principles. Demonstrated success in building pixel-perfect interfaces from detailed visual references. Experienc

Location: Remote Latin America Compensation: $2,000-$3,000/month Type: Contractor Hours: 9am - 6pm PST About Us eJam is a bootstrapped consumer products company that has built, scaled, and exited multiple brands — all without ever taking a dollar of outside capital. Our portfolio includes category leaders ranked at the top of Amazon, carried in major retailers nationwide, and sold across DTC, marketplaces, and every channel in between. We're not a startup hoping something works. We're a team that has done it repeatedly — taken products from zero to eight figures, landed them on retail shelves nationwide, and built real brands that consumers love. We operate like a holding company with the speed of a startup: small team, no bureaucracy, massive ownership. This is the place where you'll see the entire machine — sourcing, product development, packaging, manufacturing, compliance, marketing, marketplace strategy, retail — all under one roof. If you want to learn how consumer products actually get built and shipped at scale, there is no faster education than this. The Role We're looking for a Marketing Web Developer in Latin America to work directly with our marketing and CRO team in Santa Ana, California. You'll build the landing pages, Shopify sections, and A/B test variants that our marketing team runs paid traffic into — and you'll learn, page by page, why one version converts and another does not. This isn't a role where you get handed tickets and left alone. You'll join our standups, see the performance data on everything you build, and get direct feedback from the marketing team on everything you ship.
